title: DRILL 3.13 Zero-Input Response of a Second-Order System with Complex Roots
summary: This page completes a derivation of the zero-input response for a second-order discrete-time system with complex roots by solving for c cos θ and c sin θ, then finding θ and c. It also introduces Drill 3.13, asking for the zero-input response of another second-order system and giving the closed-form answer.
